calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-19-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jon Vaught, via Zoom, for Kathleen Schulte, Personal Representative.

The court and counsel discussed the current issues with this matter. Counsel advises if his attempts to resolve the matter as it was a rather complicated matter when he substituted-in as attorney.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Glisson. Not Reported.

Petition To Confirm, Sell And Distribute Estates Interest In Real Property, For Accounting And Distribution Of Income And Damages
Off Calendar Mar-09-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jon Vaught for Kathleen Schulte, Petitioner, via Court Call.

The Court inquired about proof of service. Mr. Vaught stated the proof of service should have been filed, that there was mediation last week, the matter is settled, that a notice of settlement was filed last Friday, that there are no assets as of now, that an inventory and appraisal can be done when assets are sold, and requested continuance for a few months for the court to retain jurisdiction to approve settlement. Mr. Vaught further stated that decedent died with a will, that there are no children, that parents are deceased, that parents have no siblings, and the wife is the executor. The Court inquired whether counsel looked into any other beneficiaries that are not parties to the settlement. Mr. Vaught stated that it is fine to take this petition off calendar.

The petition to confirm, sell, and distribute estate's interest in real property, etc. is off calendar. Status on close is continued from May 5, 2020 to August 10, 2020 at 9:00am in dept 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.

Petition To Confirm, Sell And Distribute Estates Interest In Real Property, For Accounting And Distribution Of Income And Damages
Off Calendar Jan-13-2020 Continued To Mar-09-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jon Vaught appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

Mr. Vaught stated that the matter is set for mediation before Judge Mark Eaton on February 25, 2020, that courtesy copies of the petition and proposed order have been provided, and that he does not know who Jonathan Van Ee represents. Mr. Vaught also stated that the Parties have agreed to obtain appraisals because one of the Parties wants to buy the other one out. The Court read the Probate Examiner's notes as to some of the procedural issues with the petition. The Petition to Confirm, Sell and Distribute Estates Interest in Real Property, etc. is continued to March 9, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The Court stated that the notice issues are to be cured timely so that the Court can hear the petition on that date.

Judge: Cecilia P. Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
